content.full_text:
TO: FPP - Legal Dept.

REQUEST FOR WRITTEN CONFIRMATION OF LEGAL ADVICE FROM LOUISA MENCHACA....

DATE: June 10, 1992

NOTE: Called FPP (916) 322-5901 on Thursday, June 4, 1992. Spoke with Louisa Menchaca who gave me verbal advice on the following matters and instructed me to write to obtain confirmation (written) of her advice.

BACKGROUND INFORMATION:

1. I am currently a Planning Commissioner for the County of Napa.
2. I filed election papers for County Supervisor - District 5, in February, 1992.
3. An applicant's project was approved by the Planning Commission on a 4 to 1 vote on May 6, 1992. My vote was one of the 4 approvals.
4. I lost the election for County Supervisor - District 5, on June 2, 1992.
5. On June 3, 1992, the applicants' attorney (see #3 above) approached me and asked if I had sustained any campaign deficit. I had. Attorney asked if the applicant could donate money to help defray my campaign deficit. Attorney did not indicate any amount of money which might be forthcoming.
5. I then called FPP for advice on June 4, 1992.

ADVICE RECEIVED:

Ms. Menchaca, to the best of my understanding, indicated the following:

1. Applicant could donate $250 or less now; OR applicant could donate in excess of $250 after 3 months from the approval date mentioned in #3 above (5-6-92) under "BACKGROUND INFORMATION". Date possible for donation in excess of $250 would be August 7, 1992.
2. Campaign account must remain open.
3. No other projects by applicant could be pending for hearing before the County Planning Commission.
4. I could use donation to pay back personal loan made by me to my campaign.
5. I must still file semi-annual report of July 31st, and all other reports as needed when account is closed.
6. The donation of $1,000 from a totally unrelated matter from a PAC not yet received, but expected in 2-3 weeks, could be used to pay back campaign deficit (personal loan) as well.

Please send me written confirmation of the above advice so I can proceed legally with the above matters.

Thank you,

DIANA JOYCE MITCHELL
847 Marina Dr. - Napa, CA 94559
(707) 252-9057

The image shows a stamp or label with the following text:

"JUN 10 | 22 | 92"

This appears to be a date stamp, indicating June 10, 1992. The format suggests it might be used for tracking documents or files.
